blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
